name: Soy Quarter-Pounder
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup wheat germ or bread crumbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Coarsely grind the cooked soybeans in a blender or food processor.
3. Mix the ground soybeans with the remaining ingredients.
4. Shape the mixture into patties.
5. Bake the patties on a lightly oiled baking sheet for 20 minutes, turning once, or broil for 5 minutes on each side.
Per serving: 258 calories; 21g protein; 168mg sodium; 27g carbohydrates; 12g fat; 107mg cholesterol; 123mg calcium.
